title: Enterprise Architect (2-year contract )
description:
Enterprise Architect

Are you ready to shape the future of enterprise systems in a global shipping & logistics company?
We’re looking for a forward-thinking Enterprise Architect to drive cloud-native adoption, secure data integration, and large-scale digital transformation.

What’s in it for you:

· Lead high-impact cloud & data projects (Azure, Kafka, AI/ML, DevOps)

· Enjoy a highly competitive remuneration package

· Work with global stakeholders in a dynamic industry

· 2-year contract with high potential to convert to permanent.

We are looking for a strategic and technically adept Enterprise Architect to lead the design and evolution of our enterprise technology landscape. This role requires broad expertise across cloud platforms (preferably Azure), data streaming (Kafka, etc.), data architecture, DevOps, security, AI, and software product development. A key focus will be on designing integration frameworks that connect internal systems and external partners to enable seamless, secure, and scalable operations.

Role and Responsibilities:

· Define and maintain enterprise architecture practices, standards, and roadmaps aligned with business and digital transformation goals.

· Lead architectural governance and ensure alignment across business units and technology domains.

· Drive and oversee the planning and design of major system components and changes and ensure business requirements and objectives are met with emphasis on security, scalability, performance and cost effectiveness.

· Ensure high security standards are being employed across all projects.

· Lead and design data engineering processes and practices, drive modernization of data pipelines towards integration with AI, ML and other modern data processing technologies.

· Study and apply knowledge from shipping and logistics domains.

· Engage and consult with stakeholders including internal entities within the company and external entities including vendors and business partners.

Requirements:

· Bachelor’s or higher degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

· 10+ years of experience in SW architecture or senior technical leadership roles.

· Proven experience with Microsoft Azure and cloud-native architecture.

· Strong expertise in service oriented, distributed computing, and event-driven architecture.

· Deep knowledge of data architecture, DevOps, security, and AI/ML platforms.

· Experience designing integration frameworks for internal and external systems.

· Familiarity with maritime technologies, standards, and operational systems is a strong plus.

· Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert.

· TOGAF or equivalent enterprise architecture certification.

· Confluent Certified Developer or Architect for Apache Kafka.

· Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA).

· CISSP or equivalent security certification.

· Experience in Maritime industry, particularly in container shipping and logistics, will be advantageous.


To apply, please send your CV to Johnson@innergy-consulting.com .

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Thank you for your understanding!

postedCompany.description:
We provide specialized maritime, IT, HR and office professional headhunting services with a personal touch to both our clients and candidates and help connect them together.


At Innergy, we strive to be the leading maritime and shipping recruitment firm to source and deliver energetic and passionate talent who aspire to make a difference in their work for companies that recognise that people are their greatest assets.


Please visit our website at www.innergy-consulting.com to know more about us.
